notes: 'masyaallah' = 'what God has willed', expresses admiration with implicit warding-against-evil-eye. Common when praising someone's work, child, possession. Multi-word variant 'masya Allah' (two words) + Arabic-English transliteration 'mashallah' deferred. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: which spelling is more common in your circles (masyaallah / masya Allah / mashallah).
